seoTitle: How to Merge Multiple Items Together in Canva
metaDescription: Learn how to combine several elements into one grouped design in Canva, so your layouts stay tidy and move together when you resize or reposition them.
intro: Combining separate elements into a single grouped item in Canva keeps your designs organized and makes editing much faster. This walkthrough shows you how to select multiple pieces, merge them together, and use the result in social posts, marketing graphics, or branded templates without them shifting out of place.

steps.heading: Select the items you want to merge
steps.body: Click the first element on your canvas, then hold Shift and click each additional item to add it to your selection. This works for shapes, text, images, or any mix of elements.

steps.heading: Group the selected elements
steps.body: With everything selected, use Canva's grouping option so the items behave as one object. This lets you move, resize, or duplicate them together instead of adjusting each piece individually.

steps.heading: Adjust positioning before finalizing
steps.body: Fine-tune spacing and alignment while the items are still selected, since it's easier to nudge pieces into place before they're locked together as a group.

steps.heading: Reuse the merged element across designs
steps.body: Once merged, copy the grouped item into other Canva projects to keep branding consistent across social posts, presentations, and marketing materials.

faq.question: Can I ungroup items after merging them in Canva?
faq.answer: Yes, grouped elements can be ungrouped at any time, letting you edit individual pieces again before regrouping if needed.

faq.question: Does merging items in Canva flatten them into a single image?
faq.answer: No, grouping keeps each element editable — text stays as text and shapes stay as shapes, they just move and resize together.

faq.question: Is this feature available on the free version of Canva?
faq.answer: Basic grouping is available to free Canva users, making it accessible whether you're just starting out or managing business designs.

faq.question: Can I merge items that are on different layers?
faq.answer: Yes, as long as the items are selected together, their layer order is preserved when you group them.
